textByHash.6f7cec2cf3bc55966d3c0787d4b3f6d79e9ad423: It was a great plan! Sabotaging the base of the statue and bribing that boatman to crash into it!
textByHash.800d10accc8391f3ce60c6263457b3489017bc2b: My axe on his head would be more useful!
textByHash.93cce0e8d42d014081d35d14fd7a25c555229e03: Our slaves are too weak, it will never work.
textByHash.d946712cd3af35fe7273705041f22e8c0a00f214: We are nearly ready with our next test.
